practiceChallenge.title: Fill in the tree-traversal clues
practiceChallenge.description: Complete the helper so it returns the right idea for DFS, BFS, and BST-style order clues.
hints: DFS goes down one path first.
BFS looks across a whole level first.
BST order uses smaller-left and larger-right.
practiceChallenge.successMessage: Nice work. You rebuilt the main tree-traversal clues.
practiceChallenge.retryMessage: Not yet. Recheck how DFS, BFS, and BST order differ.

blanks.label: Main clue for BST search order
